Velvoite.title: Velvoite
Velvoite.description: EU financial regulation corpus — obligations, deadlines, enforcement decisions, and recent changes across DORA, MiCA, GDPR, AI Act, AML, MiFID II, and more. Covers EUR-Lex, EBA, ESMA, EIOPA, FIN-FSA, and BaFin publications. Also provides live EUR-Lex document lookup by CELEX number and CJEU case law search. Requires VELVOITE_API_KEY.

Slack.title: Slack
Slack.description: Search messages, read channels, find discussions across your workspace.

Google Drive.title: Google Drive
Google Drive.description: Search, read, and fetch documents from Google Drive.
